ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "class_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class type of the animal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the animal */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the animal */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank of the animal */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the animal */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_class_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_type_id") REFERENCES class_types ("class_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_types" (
  "class_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class type */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class type */,
  "parent_class_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent class type ID for hierarchical relationships */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical attribute record */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal the attributes belong to */,
  "hair" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has hair */,
  "feathers" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has feathers */,
  "eggs" INTEGER /* Whether the animal lays eggs */,
  "milk" INTEGER /* Whether the animal produces milk */,
  "airborne" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is airborne */,
  "aquatic" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is aquatic */,
  "predator" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is a predator */,
  "toothed" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has teeth */,
  "backbone" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has a backbone */,
  "breathes" INTEGER /* Whether the animal breathes air */,
  "venomous" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is venomous */,
  "fins" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has fins */,
  "legs" INTEGER /* Number of legs the animal has */,
  "tail" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has a tail */,
  "domestic" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is domestic */,
  "catsize" INTEGER /* Size of the animal in comparison to a cat */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range of the animal */,
  "length_range" TEXT /* Length range of the animal */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the animal */,
  "sound" INTEGER /* Whether the animal makes sounds */,
  "smell" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has a distinctive smell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_attributes_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., terrestrial, aquatic, arboreal) */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_habitats" (
  "animal_habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-habitat association */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat */,
  "habitat_preference" TEXT /* Animal's preference for the habitat (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_habitats_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_habitats_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  "threat_level" TEXT /* Threat level of the conservation status (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "conservation_efforts" TEXT /* Conservation efforts for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_conservation_status" (
  "animal_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-conservation status association */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation status */,
  "conservation_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the conservation status was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_conservation_status_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_conservation_status_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES conservation_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Field of research */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research log entry */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal being researched */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the research activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of research activity (e.g., observation, analysis) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or findings from the research activity */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., observation, experiment, analysis) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the research activity took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_logs_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who authored the publication */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal the publication is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, book chapter, conference paper) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
